problem: Can ocean acidification be safely reversed — what biochemical approach?
hypothesis: If Photocatalytic oxidation under visible light is applied to what, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Microbial community sequencing with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
